page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A SimBiology-Based GUI for Standardized QSP Model Development and Application.

version 1.0.2 (74.9 MB) by Iraj Hosseini.

https://github.com/feigelman/gQSPsim-release.

The app is used for QSP Modeling and Simulation.
